naive<-cc_long_FC |> filter(state == 'uc_inflamed_naive_FC') |>   mutate(logFC = case_when(
  logFC == -Inf ~ -100,
  logFC == Inf ~ 100,
  TRUE ~ as.numeric(logFC))) |> write_tsv('uc_naive_cytoscape_logFC_n.tsv')

treated<-cc_long_FC |> filter(state == 'uc_inflamed_treated_FC') |>   mutate(logFC = case_when(
  logFC == -Inf ~ -100,
  logFC == Inf ~ 100,
  TRUE ~ as.numeric(logFC))) |> write_tsv('uc_treated_cytoscape_logFC_n.tsv')



prad<-cc_long_FC |> filter(state == 'uc_inflamed_naive_FC' | state == 'uc_inflamed_treated_FC') |> 
  filter(logFC != -Inf) |> 
as_tbl_graph() |> 
  activate(nodes) |> mutate(degree = centrality_degree(mode='all'),betweenness = centrality_betweenness(directed = T)) |> 
  ggraph(layout='centrality', cent=betweenness) + 
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = logFC),arrow = arrow(type = \closed\"
